title: cereus royenii
intro: Cereus royenii, also known as the Night-Blooming Cereus or Selenicereus, is a species of flowering cactus native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cereus royenii include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and providing relief from digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy in various cultures. Cereus royenii can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and salves, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
